companyId.description: Your company id in Calliper. During the onboarding you can find it by selecting Segment integration. After onboarding is complete you can find it by opening "Data Sources" in the main menu, pressing "New Data Source" and pressing "Connect" on a Segment card.
companyId.label: Company id

segmentKey.description: Your Segment Key in Calliper. Please follow the instructions to find the Company id, secret key is located in a field next to it.
segmentKey.label: Segment Key

actions.name: Alias
actions.description: Create an alias to a user id. Used when a single user has been initially identified as several users.

fields.label: Timestamp
fields.description: The timestamp of the event. Could be any date string/number value compatible with JavaScript Date constructor: e.g. milliseconds epoch or an ISO datetime. If time is not sent with the event, it will be set to the request time.

time.title: Timestamp
time.description: The timestamp of the event. Could be any date string/number value compatible with JavaScript Date constructor: e.g. milliseconds epoch or an ISO datetime. If time is not sent with the event, it will be set to the request time.

fields.label: New ID
fields.description: A new user id to be merged with the original distinct id. Each alias can only map to one distinct id.

new_id.title: New ID
new_id.description: A new user id to be merged with the original distinct id. Each alias can only map to one distinct id.

fields.label: Previous ID
fields.description: A previous user id to be merged with the alias.

previous_id.title: Previous ID
previous_id.description: A previous user id to be merged with the alias.

actions.name: Identify Group
actions.description: Updates or adds properties to a group. Group is created if it does not exist.

fields.label: Timestamp
fields.description: The timestamp of the event. Could be any date string/number value compatible with JavaScript Date constructor: e.g. milliseconds epoch or an ISO datetime. If time is not sent with the event, it will be set to the request time.

time.title: Timestamp
time.description: The timestamp of the event. Could be any date string/number value compatible with JavaScript Date constructor: e.g. milliseconds epoch or an ISO datetime. If time is not sent with the event, it will be set to the request time.

fields.label: Group ID
fields.description: The unique identifier of the group.

group_id.title: Group ID
group_id.description: The unique identifier of the group.

fields.label: Group Properties
fields.description: The properties to set on the group profile.

traits.title: Group Properties
traits.description: The properties to set on the group profile.

actions.name: Identify User
actions.description: Set the user ID to recognise other evens by the same user

fields.label: Timestamp
fields.description: The timestamp of the event. Could be any date string/number value compatible with JavaScript Date constructor: e.g. milliseconds epoch or an ISO datetime. If time is not sent with the event, it will be set to the request time.

fields.label: User ID
fields.description: A distinct ID of an identified (logged in) user.

user_id.title: User ID
user_id.description: A distinct ID of an identified (logged in) user.

fields.label: Anonymous ID
fields.description: A distinct ID of an unidentified (logged out) user. Device id is used if available

anonymous_id.title: Anonymous ID
anonymous_id.description: A distinct ID of an unidentified (logged out) user. Device id is used if available

fields.description: User's first name

fields.description: User's full name

fields.label: Email
fields.description: User's email address

fields.description: User's phone number

fields.label: User Creation Time
fields.description: The timestamp for when the user profile was first created

actions.name: Track Event
actions.description: Send your product event to Calliper.

fields.label: Event Type
fields.description: A type of your event, e.g. a sign up or a name of an action within your product.

event.title: Event Type
event.description: A type of your event, e.g. a sign up or a name of an action within your product.

fields.label: Timestamp
fields.description: The timestamp of the event. Could be any date string/number value compatible with JavaScript Date constructor: e.g. milliseconds epoch or an ISO datetime. If time is not sent with the event, it will be set to the request time.

time.title: Timestamp
time.description: The timestamp of the event. Could be any date string/number value compatible with JavaScript Date constructor: e.g. milliseconds epoch or an ISO datetime. If time is not sent with the event, it will be set to the request time.

anonymous_id.description: A distinct ID of an unidentified (logged out) user. Device id is used if available

group_id.description: The unique identifier of the group that performed this event.

fields.label: Event ID
fields.description: A random id that is unique to an event. ID is being used to prevent event duplication. All the events that share the same unique id besides the first one will be ignored.

event_unique_id.title: Event ID
event_unique_id.description: A random id that is unique to an event. ID is being used to prevent event duplication. All the events that share the same unique id besides the first one will be ignored.
